reviews.review_title: This does NOT WORK please fix it
reviews.review_description: Conceptually this is a great idea and I would love to use it to keep in touch with Friends & Family in holographic form -- HOWEVER, the download and install works great, then I found myself in a white room where nothing works at all. I can see my hands, and can bring up a menu pinching right thumb and index finger together, but unable to do that on the left hand. So, never got past entering my email address and entering the code I was emailed. The app freezes and you have to manually shut down the headset to get out of the app. PLEASE, go back to the drawing board and make this into the great app that it can be. Thanks. That only My2Cents.
